title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 33.  OUACHITA EXPRESSWAY AUTHORITY

§2131.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be referred to as the "Ouachita Expressway Authority Act".

Acts 2007, No. 329, §1.
